changes: Adiciona controlos custom internos play/pause e som para garantir interligacao com creative GAM
Mantem overlay de conteudo abaixo dos controlos e botao fechar apenas em floating
Permite init(container), setAdTag, requestAd, setPlaylist, play e pause por data-player-id
notes: v21: close button only visible in actual internal floating state; native central play hidden; custom play/audio controls hardened; optional data-floating-mode="frame" disables internal floating for GAM iframe usage.
v21-no-visible-debug: console-only debug/status; no visible player status; floating close only
